purpose: Granular bridge TODO list from the 2026-05-01 reality-check pass. This persists the work queue because live br bead creation timed out in this session.

agent_mail.impact: File reservations and coordination mail were unavailable for this pass.

tracker_health.followup_policy: When br recovers, create or reopen beads from this artifact rather than treating the closed tracker as proof that all reality-check gaps are done.

replacement_level_gate.policy: Do not promote to L1 until current_level and release_tag_policy advance together with fresh evidence.

validation_evidence.targeted_check: pass: rch cargo check -p frankenlibc_conformance -p frankenlibc-harness --tests
validation_evidence.json_parse: pass: new semantic overlay, bridge backlog, and C11 fixture parse as JSON
validation_evidence.artifact_gates: pass: support matrix maintenance, symbol fixture coverage, per-symbol fixture tests, feature parity gap ledger, feature parity gap-bead coverage, replacement levels
validation_evidence.workspace_fmt: blocked_by_existing_drift: cargo fmt --check reports broad pre-existing formatting drift in frankenlibc-abi tests and wchar_abi.rs
validation_evidence.workspace_clippy: blocked_by_existing_drift: rch cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings fails on pre-existing unused unsafe blocks in crates/frankenlibc-abi/tests/conformance_diff_dprintf.rs

work_items.title: Make semantic contract overlay exhaustive and gated
work_items.why: support_matrix.json reports Stub=0, but code still contains no-op, fallback, unsupported, and bootstrap semantic contracts under Implemented/RawSyscall taxonomy rows.
subtasks: Inventory every no-op, ENOSYS, abort-only, unsupported, bootstrap, and deterministic fallback contract in frankenlibc-abi and frankenlibc-core.
Join each contract to support_matrix.json by symbol name, module, and version-script export status.
Classify each row as full_semantics, compat_noop, deterministic_fallback, limited_bootstrap, unsupported_platform_contract, or proof_gap.
Add a check script that fails when new fallback/no-op text appears without an overlay entry.
Update README and FEATURE_PARITY to make taxonomy status and semantic parity status distinct claims.

work_items.title: Keep reality and coverage artifacts freshly regenerated
work_items.why: The reality check depends on machine artifacts, not prose or stale tracker closure counts.
subtasks: Regenerate tests/conformance/reality_report.v1.json from support_matrix.json.
Regenerate tests/conformance/support_matrix_maintenance_report.v1.json.
Regenerate tests/conformance/conformance_coverage_snapshot.v1.json.
Regenerate tests/conformance/symbol_fixture_coverage.v1.json.
Regenerate tests/conformance/per_symbol_fixture_tests.v1.json.
Regenerate tests/conformance/feature_parity_gap_ledger.v1.json.
Regenerate tests/conformance/feature_parity_gap_bead_coverage.v1.json and dashboard markdown.

work_items.title: Recover live br backlog from reality-check gaps
work_items.why: bv reports zero open/in-progress work while the feature parity gap ledger still reports 111 gaps.
subtasks: Repair or rebuild the br database/source-of-truth state until br ready/list/create complete without hanging.
Import this backlog as real beads with dependency structure.
Create one bead per high-level gap class and child beads for fixture, proof, semantic, performance, and release-gate closure.
Mark tracker health failure separately from code quality failure.
Keep one-bead-at-a-time execution once live beads exist again.

work_items.title: Close feature parity verification gaps
work_items.why: The gap ledger reports 111 unfinished rows even though all beads are closed.
subtasks: Group the 111 ledger gaps by section and owner bead.
Identify closed beads whose promised evidence is missing or stale.
Reopen or recreate beads for each missing proof, fixture, or gate row.
Make every DONE row point at current machine-verifiable evidence.
Fail CI when feature parity prose advances without matching evidence artifacts.

work_items.title: Expand fixture coverage beyond single-digit symbol coverage
work_items.why: The refreshed coverage snapshot has 389 symbols with fixtures and 3728 exported symbols uncovered by symbol-fixture coverage.
subtasks: Prioritize high-surface families with low or zero fixture coverage.
Add focused host-parity fixture packs for one family at a time.
Add harness tests that execute fixtures directly and through isolated subprocess mode.
Regenerate coverage artifacts after every fixture slice.
Track family-level coverage thresholds separately from global coverage percent.

work_items.title: Maintain L1 claim-control honesty
work_items.why: Replacement levels must not advance faster than verified standalone behavior, release-tag policy, fixture evidence, and smoke readiness.
subtasks: Run scripts/check_replacement_levels.sh.
Confirm README and release-tag policy remain aligned to current_level.
Leave current_level at L0 until L1 obligations are evidence-backed.
Add L1 blockers to the live backlog once br recovers.

work_items.title: Separate L0 interpose evidence from L1 standalone replacement evidence
work_items.why: README positions FrankenLibC as an LD_PRELOAD/interposition artifact; standalone libc replacement needs stronger loader, CRT, dependency, and bootstrap evidence.
subtasks: List every host libc dependency reachable from the release artifact.
Add standalone link/run fixtures that do not rely on host glibc behavior beyond the loader boundary being tested.
Gate CRT/startup/TLS/init/fini behavior separately from LD_PRELOAD smoke.
Document exactly which claims belong to L0, L1, L2, and L3.

work_items.title: Broaden hard-parts fixtures for resolver, NSS, locale, iconv, loader, stdio, and pthread
work_items.why: These are the surfaces most likely to make an apparently broad symbol inventory fail real workload parity.
subtasks: Resolver: add retry, timeout, nameserver rotation, malformed packet, and cache-behavior fixtures.
NSS: add nsswitch order, files backend, missing record, concurrent lookup, and private module-entry fixtures.
Locale/iconv: add collation, transliteration, stateful conversion, and invalid sequence fixtures.
Loader/startup: add relocation, TLS, destructor, audit, and symbol-version fixtures.
Stdio/libio: add _IO helper, buffering, locking, wide I/O, and error-state fixtures.
Pthread: add cancellation, robust mutex, cleanup handler, fork interaction, and TLS destructor fixtures.

work_items.title: Fix or quarantine repo-wide fmt/clippy/test drift
work_items.why: Substantive changes must leave a clear validation state; known gate drift must be separated from new failures.
subtasks: Run targeted fmt/check/clippy/test for changed crates and tests.
Run repo-wide fmt/check/clippy where practical and record exact unrelated failures.
Fix any failure introduced by this pass.
Open or update backlog rows for unrelated pre-existing drift.

work_items.title: Add performance baselines for ported hot paths before optimizing
work_items.why: The performance vision requires proof-driven optimization, not unmeasured rewrites.
subtasks: Rank current hot paths by real benchmark and smoke workload data.
Tie every optimization bead to a behavioral proof or fixture pack.
Add regression budgets for strict and hardened membrane hot paths.
Optimize only after baselines and parity checks are in place.
